name: soria-stack
description: Codex-native Soria workflow guidance (MCP-first) plus the fast $B browse flow from Soria-Inc/soria-stack.

interface.shortDescription: Soria MCP workflow guidance and fast $B browser QA for Codex
interface.longDescription: Brings the Soria pipeline and dive workflows from Soria-Inc/soria-stack into Codex. Routes every pipeline verb through the Soria MCP (mcp__soria__*), authors dbt SQL and React dives locally in git, and uses the fast $B browse flow for UI verification. The Soria CLI has been retired; Codex users must configure the Soria MCP HTTP endpoint in their client for the pipeline skills to work.
defaultPrompt: Use Soria Stack to inventory what exists for this concept via the Soria MCP
Use browse to verify this dive and capture evidence quickly
Help me promote this dive to prod via warehouse_promote + PR + CI
